text.message: It's not the greatest pick from the bot but it's playable I guess
I would have taken that spot in second
May we not fight each others ports?
I dont road to the wood port and you dont plow the wheat port?
I have no idea why blue closed off the rock tbh
Gave black all the advantage and he plays without wheat
red i think you set us too far behind here
we needed to do fair trades and we are so behind
You get under with 2:1 if you want
i couldve given to black on their turn
I cant do anything with the deal you offered man
can we try and work together
Do it with black if you want, I offered the same on my turn
i cant give 2/1 on ur turn
think this block only hurts me
I have to make 3 cities still without rock, compared to black
Maybe you can take army blue
my ore been blocked all game
and you dont trade me wheat
im not touching army or devs
I mean sure but with army you have a chance
Without it we all just lose to black
i have a chance if the right blocks are made
It kinda doesnt matter if oj doesnt see the strength of blacks position
sorry for that oj, I knew you had 2 sheep in hand and that ensured a double pop
you guys block ore all game then ask for it
Sure blue and you closed off all the ore in the board.. we can complain about what we did for ages, or we can actually coordinate for you to vuy devs
me giving ore doesnt help me buy devs
Sure and all the 6s that rolled before lol
I am not winning this game too soon my dude
For who was bad? I need ore and he needs to pop
idk why ur giving red anything
i was hit the whole game lol
black has 4 vps or 3 and mono
Its not gg because he doesnt have 3:1
